introSection: Big Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at White Sand Gate Park in Meilan, Haikou, Hainan, China. The ride opened on 25 December 2011. Between June 2018 and February 2019, the roller coaster was demolished.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This ride was almost identical to the Arrow Dynamics Loop & Corkscrew roller coaster. There are three inversions: a vertical loop and a double corkscrew.

fullText:
Big Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at White Sand Gate Park in Meilan, Haikou, Hainan, China. The ride opened on 25 December 2011. Between June 2018 and February 2019, the roller coaster was demolished.

This ride was almost identical to the Arrow Dynamics Loop & Corkscrew roller coaster. There are three inversions: a vertical loop and a double corkscrew.
